subcodes.first_line: Strange indeed it is that all people are in a state of agitation. Some ten to fifteen days ago, with the German Consul regarding the matter of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عجیب است جمیع مردم مضطربند ده پانزده روز قبل با قنسول آلمان در مسئلهٴ
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @war and peace, @competition vs. cooperation; the struggle for existence, @transcending the material condition, @nationalism; love of country, @power of love
